title: Portfolio Summary
prompt: Provide an executive summary of the overall portfolio health. Highlight key risk indicators, credit quality trends, and any areas requiring immediate attention.

title: Concentration Risk
prompt: Analyze concentration risk across the portfolio. Identify segments where exposure is elevated, flag any single-name or sector concentrations, and compare against prior periods.

title: Delinquency Trends
prompt: Deep dive on delinquency trends. What is driving late payments, which vintages or segments show the most stress, and how has the 30/60/90+ day buckets trended?

title: Risk Segments
prompt: Identify the highest-risk segments in the portfolio. Explain which metrics are driving elevated risk and what the near-term outlook looks like for those segments.

title: Exec Briefing
prompt: Summarize portfolio performance for an executive audience. Three to five bullet points: headline numbers, trend direction, and one clear action item.

title: Stress Outlook
prompt: How would this portfolio perform under a moderate economic stress scenario? Use the current metrics to assess loss absorption capacity and identify the most vulnerable segments.
